paragraphs.text: the reason i made this post, is bc i support Stop Destroying Videogames reason is if i want to play games that was discontinued in online its not available for everyone to get it unless you buying physical copy in console but not on pc side bc everyone bought games on steam or epic or etc in digital costs, for any games except from online or live services games if they run live service games and they decided stop there then they should update to single player to smooth transition for better experience like crew 1 & Console is easy to get hold of games than pc when games alr discontinued and u looking for them u can't buy or get it to cause problems but if you talking about only online games u have to forced update online to offline games its not only for pc but also console if they decided shut down all servers that players can no longer play game they pay for it they have to forced update game to offline mode to access cuz i dont love wasting money same goes everyone and future as well my language sucks but i am honesty about this bc i am worry some games can take away from me when i bought cuz if i bought that game i still own that game bc i am owner of this game that i paid for it but u can't not block everyone access your games its like monopoly
